mapper.select: SELECT NVL(sales."totalSales", 0) as "totalSales", p.commission_rate as "commissionRate", NVL(sales."totalSales" * (p.commission_rate / 100), 0) as "commissionAmount", NVL(sales."partnerCouponAmount", 0) as "partnerCouponAmount", NVL(sales."totalSales" - (sales."totalSales" * (p.commission_rate / 100)) - NVL(sales."partnerCouponAmount", 0), 0) as "netAmount" FROM partner p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.partner_id, SUM(o.real_total_amount) as "totalSales", SUM(cu.partner_discount_amount) as "partnerCouponAmount" FROM place pl JOIN room r ON r.place_id = pl.place_id JOIN reservation rv ON rv.room_id = r.room_id JOIN order_detail od ON od.reservation_id = rv.reservation_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = od.order_id LEFT JOIN coupon_usage cu ON cu.order_id = o.order_id AND cu.status = 'USED' WHERE TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{month} AND o.status != 'CANCELED' GROUP BY pl.partner_id ) sales ON sales.partner_id = p.partner_id WHERE p.partner_id = #{partnerId}

SELECT rv.reservation_id as "reservationId", r.room_name as "roomName", o.real_total_amount as "amount",
-- 수수료액: 결제금액 * (수수료율 / 100) ROUND(o.real_total_amount * (p.commission_rate / 100)) as "commissionAmount",
-- 파트너 쿠폰 부담금 NVL(cu.partner_discount_amount, 0) as "couponAmount",
-- 최종 정산액 = 결제금액 - 수수료 - 쿠폰부담금 (o.real_total_amount - ROUND(o.real_total_amount * (p.commission_rate / 100)) - NVL(cu.partner_discount_amount, 0)) as "netAmount"
FROM partner p JOIN place pl ON pl.partner_id = p.partner_id JOIN room r ON r.place_id = pl.place_id JOIN reservation rv ON rv.room_id = r.room_id JOIN order_detail od ON od.reservation_id = rv.reservation_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = od.order_id LEFT JOIN coupon_usage cu ON cu.order_id = o.order_id AND cu.status = 'USED'
WHERE p.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{month} AND o.status != 'CANCELED'
ORDER BY rv.check_out_date DESC, rv.reservation_id DESC
